chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ أَحَقُّ بِالْوَلَدِ إِذَا كَانَ صَغِيراً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 31 – The one who is more rightful with the child when it was small

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/80)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/80)
text: سُئِلَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يُطَلِّقُ امْرَأَتَهُ وَ بَيْنَهُمَا وَلَدٌ أَيُّهُمَا أَحَقُّ بِالْوَلَدِ قَالَ الْمَرْأَةُ أَحَقُّ بِالْوَلَدِ مَا لَمْ تَتَزَوَّجْ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Ali Bin Muhammad Al Qasany, from Al Qasim Bin Muhammad, from Al Minqary, from the one who mentioned it, said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> was asked about the man who divorces his wife, and between the two of them is a child, which of the two is more rightful with the child?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The woman is more rightful with the child so long as she does not get married (again)’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Ali ibn Muhammad al-Qasaniy from al-Qasim ibn Muhammad from al-Minqariy from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: “Once, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, was asked about the case of a man who divorces his wife. They have a child, which one of them has more right for the child? He (the Imam) said, ‘The woman has more right as long as she does not marry.’”
